title: Baa! Baa! Black Sheep
content:
"Baa! Baa! Black sheep, have you any wool?"
    "Yes, marry, have I, three bags full;
    One for my master, and one for my dame,
    But none for the little boy that lives down the lane!"
meaning: About: Walter Crane was an English artist and book illustrator. He produced paintings, illustrations, children's books, ceramic tiles and other decorative arts.
